hero.title: Everything Your Business Needs. Under One Roof.
hero.description: From custom software to full business builds — we architect the systems that turn ideas into revenue machines. No fragmented vendors. No communication gaps. One team, total ownership.

comparison.title: What Sets Us Apart
comparison.description: The difference between a vendor and a growth partner.

items.oneTeam: One team owns the entire outcome
items.compounding: Systems built to compound over time
items.revenuFirst: Revenue-first — every decision optimizes for growth
items.transparency: Full transparency: weekly demos, shared dashboards
items.postLaunch: Post-launch support included in every tier
items.directAccess: You talk to the builders, not account managers

items.multipleVendors: Multiple vendors, nobody owns the big picture
items.oneOff: One-off campaigns with no compounding effect
items.supportEnds: Support ends when the invoice is paid
items.accountManagers: Account managers relay messages to developers
